summary: Completed comprehensive CRM backend testing. All 20 CRM endpoints tested successfully including agent management, lead management, and WhatsApp integration for auto-lead creation.
passed_tests: Agent CRUD operations: create, list, list with filters, get by ID, update, deactivate
Lead CRUD operations: create, list, list with filters, get stats, get by ID, update, delete
Lead assignment to agents working correctly
Lead status updates with history tracking
WhatsApp webhook auto-creates leads from incoming messages
WhatsApp webhook increments message_count for existing leads
All endpoints properly require X-API-Key authentication
Proper error handling for non-existent resources (404s)
Lead statistics endpoint provides accurate counts by status and source
